name: Parking Puzzle Escape Challenge
description: Parking Puzzle Escape is a thrilling and brain-teasing parking challenge where precision and strategy are key! Carefully park multiple vehicles in tight spaces without causing any collisions. The faster you solve each puzzle, the higher your score! With increasing difficulty, tricky layouts, and smooth controls, Parking Puzzle Escape will put your spatial awareness and problem-solving skills to the test. Can you park every vehicle safely and beat the clock? Play now and prove youre the ultimate parking master!
